title: The Trung Sisters' Uprising
summary: In 40 AD, two sisters, Trung Trac and Trung Nhi, raised the flag of rebellion, driving out the Eastern Han army and regaining independence for the country after more than a century of domination.

slides.text: Under the rule of the Eastern Han Dynasty, our people lived in great misery. In the Me Linh region, there were two brave sisters, Trung Trac and Trung Nhi.
slides.imagePrompt: The Trung sisters, Trung Trac and Trung Nhi, talking to oppressed villagers, sympathetic and brave faces, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: In 40 AD, the two sisters took a sacred oath: 'First, to avenge the nation; second, to restore the Hung family's ancient legacy'.
slides.imagePrompt: The Trung Sisters taking a sacred oath in front of their army, solemn ceremony, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Thousands of people from all over responded, joining the sisters as they rode elephants into battle against the enemy.
slides.imagePrompt: The Trung Sisters riding two big elephants, leading a massive army of Vietnamese people, epic battle scene, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: The enemy fled in fear. Trung Trac was honored as Queen, establishing the capital in Me Linh and regaining autonomy for the nation.
slides.imagePrompt: Trung Trac being crowned as Queen, Me Linh capital celebration, people cheering, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: What animal did the Trung Sisters ride into battle?
When the rebellion succeeded, where did the Trung Sisters establish their capital?
